$schema_notes: External source registry for scrape_jobs.py. Edit this file to add/remove
scrape targets and search keywords without touching Python.
keyword_sets: named, reusable keyword query strings (LinkedIn boolean OR
syntax). Reference them from a source via "keyword_set": "<name>".
sources: each entry needs "name", "type", "region". Then, by type:
Any source may instead supply an explicit "url" to override URL building.
fallbacks: name -> [alternate urls] tried when a source returns no content.

keyword_sets.leader: Engineering Manager OR Head of Engineering OR CTO OR VP Engineering OR Director of Engineering OR Head of Software
keyword_sets.mgmt_broad: Engineering Manager OR Program Manager OR Technical Program Manager OR Engineering Lead OR Head of Engineering OR Director of Engineering
keyword_sets.transformation: Head of Digital Transformation OR Transformation Manager OR Innovation Manager OR Head of Innovation OR Head of Digital OR VP Technology
keyword_sets.city: Engineering Manager OR Head of Engineering OR CTO OR VP Engineering OR Engineering Lead OR Director of Engineering
keyword_sets.cto_vp: CTO OR Chief Technology Officer OR VP Engineering OR VP Technology OR Chief Digital Officer
keyword_sets.director: Director of Engineering OR Director of Technology OR Engineering Director OR Head of Technology

sources.name: linkedin_ch_leader_1
sources.keywords: Engineering Manager OR CTO OR Head of Engineering OR VP Engineering

sources.name: google_linkedin_de
